text.title: google-display-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-display-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using EXACT or PHRASE match types for display keyword targeting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Display keyword targeting ignores match type qualifiers; only BROAD is effective. Setting other match types creates confusion without changing behavior.

failure-mode.description: Agents auto-generating ad copy often exceed the 30-char headline or 90-char description limit and the request fails server-side.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Character limits are strict; oversized strings are silently rejected with a generic validation error.

failure-mode.description: Image asset uploads send raw bytes; agents that pass URLs without fetching them first hit AssetError.INVALID_IMAGE.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The Google Ads API requires binary image data in the asset creation request. Passing a URL causes a validation error without a clear error message.

failure-mode.description: Models confuse placement (specific URL) with topic (Google's content category) — these are different criterion types.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Topics are Google's managed categories; placements are specific URLs or app IDs. Using the wrong type silently changes targeting.

failure-mode.description: Customer Match list upload requires SHA-256 of normalized lowercase email; LLMs frequently skip the lowercase or strip step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Email normalization (lowercase, strip whitespace) is mandatory; skipping it results in 0% match rate with no error message.

failure-mode.description: Agents reading metrics.conversions may miss metrics.view_through_conversions; double-counting risk if both summed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: View-through conversions are tracked separately; summing both inflates ROAS calculations. Use conversions only unless analyzing display-specific metrics.
